name: Scott's Gold 200
description: This is a spiritual successor to my Fuji Kodak Gold 200 recipe, but for Nikon Z cameras. Warm tones are the name of the game here, and by defaulting to Natural Light Auto or Auto 2 white balance, it can become an every day picture control for a variety of situations.
author: Scott Tucker
whiteBalance: default to Natural Light Auto tweaked to A5.0, G0.0 for the “real” look of the recipe, but you can swap over to Auto2 A0.0, G0.0 for a more neutral but still warm look
activeDLighting: Low or Normal depending on how much light is on your subject
evComp: usually set to 0.0, but if I shift Active D-Lighting to Low or Normal, I will adjust to -0.3
